targets.name: article image and metafield create payload matches HAR-410 stable local contract

notes: HAR-410 disposable live capture records the supported Article image/metafield surfaces and the unsupported Page.onlineStoreUrl / Article.seo schema boundaries. Runtime tests enforce the newly modeled local Article image/metafield create/update/read behavior without runtime Shopify writes. Menu follow-through evidence is retained as captured navigation evidence only; menu roots remain unimplemented until a dedicated navigation model covers menu lifecycle and catalog behavior.
